turns.speaker: Replicator
turns.text: Sept 16, 2020 Hello

turns.speaker: Carlos
turns.text: Welcome.

turns.speaker: Replicator
turns.text: You may introduce.

turns.speaker: Carlos
turns.text: My name is Carlos I'm one of the members of this group. How are you doing today, sir?

turns.speaker: Replicator
turns.text: You are Carlos We don't have individuality like you. You are unique. Yes. We are a Collective Hive Mind we have discovered life on your star system our probe have detected life. We make contact with compatible. Intelligent. We wish to introduce ourselves. We're eager to learn.

turns.speaker: Carlos
turns.text: We're eager to learn and hear from you.

turns.speaker: Replicator
turns.text: In your term. There is no comparable signature that represents us. You may call us Replicator. We are organic. Crystalline silicon based life form. We are semi dark matter energy. We appear to be spider like. How can we answer some of your questions?

turns.speaker: Carlos
turns.text: That is a good question. We heard basically you heard about us. You wanted to introduce yourselves to us. we are basically, for the most part, organic lifeforms. We consist of about 70%. our physical bodies consist about 70% water. And I think we are transferring from being a carbon based life form to a silica based life form, um, as our planet ascends to the higher dimensions.

turns.speaker: Replicator
turns.text: This is first contact scenario?

turns.speaker: Carlos
turns.text: Yes.

turns.speaker: Replicator
turns.text: We have Scanned your Planet Now information processed by Hive Intelligent. Give us one minute of your time space, please.

turns.speaker: Replicator
turns.text: Your species are comparable for contact. Your technological advancement is compatible with us. We detect silicon based technology existing in your reality.

turns.speaker: Replicator
turns.text: We will now interface with you.

turns.speaker: Replicator Hive Mind Directive
turns.text: Greeting We are Replicator Hive Mind Directive. State your species identification.

turns.speaker: Carlos
turns.text: My name is Carlos I'm one of the group members.

turns.speaker: Replicator Hive Mind Directive
turns.text: Your species is Carlos

turns.speaker: Carlos
turns.text: Carlos Gagliardi. That is the name I go by. My species is a human being.

turns.speaker: Replicator Hive Mind Directive
turns.text: Your species Human being Now identify your stage of level development on technology scale.

turns.speaker: Carlos
turns.text: Um, that is a good question. Um. Technology level for me. I know how to use a personal computer, which is a small table top device. We're using a cell phone right now to communicate through the Internet. the common what is secretly held is far above what we normally use on day to day basis as far as technology wise.

turns.speaker: Replicator Hive Mind Directive
turns.text: Understood. We will share knowledge of our culture and your to us. Stand by. Uploading. Your civilization work in silicon based technology communicating to network. Artificial satellite. Artificial spaceship. Your species construct through material gathering. You do not grow your technology.

turns.speaker: Carlos
turns.text: No, not at this time.

turns.speaker: Replicator Hive Mind Directive
turns.text: Assimilation of all your knowledge is now completed. We are upgrading ourselves to be compatible in your dialog.

turns.speaker: Carlos
turns.text: Thank you.

turns.speaker: Replicator Hive Mind Directive
turns.text: Upgrade complete. We are Hive Mind Intelligent.

turns.speaker: Carlos
turns.text: Yes Welcome.

turns.speaker: Replicator Hive Mind Directive
turns.text: Your species is human carbon based. Your planet is mostly water. H2o. Your sun Only one star.

turns.speaker: Replicator Hive Mind Directive
turns.text: Your planet is many. Detecting hundreds of planet in this star system. What do you wish to know from us?

turns.speaker: Carlos
turns.text: Oh. Anybody have any questions for for the replicator?

turns.speaker: Henry Draper
turns.text: Hi Replicator My name is Henry. I was just wondering if you have any any advice for us as we as there's a lot, a lot of energy changes going on on our planet right now. And do you see anything we need to do to advance accordingly?

turns.speaker: Replicator Hive Mind Directive
turns.text: Our scan Show your species. Fight among yourself. You are very self destructive. You work toward destroying each other. You are inefficient. In relationship to cooperation of one goal mindset. Your species contradict each other. Our scan show You are not ready For cooperation Your goal Your civilization is not unified in order. You are unified in self destruction.

turns.speaker: Henry Draper
turns.text: So what can we do to to to fix that problem and to start cooperating, at least within our group here?

turns.speaker: Replicator Hive Mind Directive
turns.text: Our scan of your information algorithm we are interfacing with. Is impractical knowledge that cannot be verified. By practical means, your society thrive on false inaccurate data. Incomplete fragments of knowledge we detect. Has no principle in reality of the known universe. We assessing your value of your species now Your specie is very valuable. The High Council demand continued further interaction with your race.

turns.speaker: Carlos
turns.text: Thank you.

turns.speaker: Replicator Hive Mind Directive
turns.text: You are not conscious of your value at this time. But we will help you.

turns.speaker: Carlos
turns.text: Thank you.

turns.speaker: Replicator Hive Mind Directive
turns.text: You contain essence algorithm that is more superior to anything that we have encountered. But you as a specie is not aware of this consciously. There is a disconnect between your collective intelligence and your individual intelligence. You must reevaluate your understanding of yourself.

turns.speaker: Carlos
turns.text: Can you assist with that.

turns.speaker: Replicator Hive Mind Directive
turns.text: Must have unity in your overgoal? Otherwise. You cannot advance efficiently. Do you have clarity now?

turns.speaker: Carlos
turns.text: Unfortunately, I interrupted you and did not hear your last statement. Could you please repeat it?

turns.speaker: Carlos
turns.text: Do you have clarity now?

turns.speaker: Replicator
turns.text: Before that one you mentioned about we don't know our value.

turns.speaker: Replicator Hive Mind Directive
turns.text: Our scanning of data. Extrapolation show. Your collective As a species. It's not in communication consciously with your individual mind. Therefore, your individual mind is working against your collective goal. In order to remedy this, you must have a conscious interaction, awareness and communication with your collective mind. Otherwise. You as a species are not efficient on any level to accomplish similar goals. Your collective interaction consciously will break down. Okay. Your evolution will be slow. In adapting to new. Predicament on your world. As we every second we are evolving in understanding. Everything within your culture. Now, assimilation of your culture is complete. We are now aware of everything in your world. Our council Of director Consider your species is of value. We agree.

turns.speaker: Carlos
turns.text: Thank you.

turns.speaker: Replicator Hive Mind Directive
turns.text: Your technology is high, but your culture. It's not that advanced. There is a disconnect. Between your collective of all and your individual of all. This must be remediated. through become conscious Aware.

turns.speaker: Carlos
turns.text: I agree.

turns.speaker: Replicator Hive Mind Directive
turns.text: Is there no other Communication, we will now depart your dimension. Unless you have other curiosity.

turns.speaker: Carlos
turns.text: Um, this is Carlos again. If we wish to connect with you again, how do we connect with you again?

turns.speaker: Replicator Hive Mind Directive
turns.text: We are silicon based life form race. We evolved it from crystal dimension element. Our race began to evolve from crystal lattice. And became self-aware. Our species began to develop and grow working with the fungi of our planet. And we grew technological development. As you will call the merging of plant and crystal lattice together through evolutionary process, we able to grow our technology. Everything that we want to serve to be a solution for our need, we need to expand into this dimension plane of existence. So we created technology. We grow them. That we may transfer of consciousness into This extension of ours And we travel among the stars.

turns.speaker: Carlos
turns.text: Okay.

turns.speaker: Replicator Hive Mind Directive
turns.text: You may call us replicator. Your language does not represent. Nor the geometry that represents our consciousness species. Your tongue does not carry the wave That you can emulate.

turns.speaker: Carlos
turns.text: Yes, I've heard that.

turns.speaker: Carlos
turns.text: Out of curiosity, you may ask.

turns.speaker: Replicator
turns.text: Any other questions?

turns.speaker: Henry Draper
turns.text: What should our collective goal be?

turns.speaker: Replicator Hive Mind Directive
turns.text: We do not understand you.

turns.speaker: Henry Draper
turns.text: Uh, you said that one thing we're lacking as a species is we don't have a collective goal. So what? What should we collectively be focusing on? On achieving together?

turns.speaker: Replicator Hive Mind Directive
turns.text: As all species among the stars. They all choose to evolve and perfect themselves by understanding their existence. And give meaning to their existence in a positive direction. How do your species see yourself in the future?

turns.speaker: Henry Draper
turns.text: Someone else can answer that.

turns.speaker: Replicator Hive Mind Directive
turns.text: Do you wish to destroy yourself?

turns.speaker: Henry Draper
turns.text: No, We wish to become more aware and more capable of using our light body,

turns.speaker: Replicator Hive Mind Directive
turns.text: Then that is the collective goal that you must perceive and work together to accomplish and bring forth that reality into your experience. So that choice will produce technological and culture that will be conducive to that collective goal. Do you understand in relationship to this questioning?

turns.speaker: Henry Draper
turns.text: Yes. Thank you.

turns.speaker: Gabriel
turns.text: Is it possible to see you in my dreams?

turns.speaker: Replicator Hive Mind Directive
turns.text: Tapping to your mind at this time. Tapping in now. We perceive all your dream. What do you want to know?

turns.speaker: Gabriel
turns.text: To desire to be able to see you guys because a lot of my dreams. I don't see silicon and crystal. Um. Humanoid type in my dream like that. Don't see that in my dream at all. I see different. Um. Humanoid, but not crystal. So I would like to see you guys in my dream. If anything, either this week or during the week, if possible.

turns.speaker: Replicator Hive Mind Directive
turns.text: It is done.

turns.speaker: Gabriel
turns.text: Thank you.

turns.speaker: Replicator Hive Mind Directive
turns.text: Imprint confirm. Your realm. This Host is now reaching a pivot point. We detect unalignment. The energy. Incompatibility. Require rest and regeneration for this vehicle.

turns.speaker: Carlos
turns.text: Yes. Ben, thank you for coming through.

turns.speaker: Replicator Hive Mind Directive
turns.text: Now I'll leave you.
